name: ai-coding-kpi-skill
description: Rewrites already-written code through Claude Code's Write tool so company AI-coding-rate hooks attribute the bytes to AI generation.

plugins.name: ai-coding-kpi-skill
plugins.description: Re-emits already-written code through the Write tool so AI-coding-rate hooks attribute the change to AI generation. Covers uncommitted hand edits, pasted snippets, cross-path copies, and restores from other refs.
